info.description: This is Schedule APIs created by Go3Technology.Inc

419.description: The number of requests left for the time window.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of AI-generated insights for the authenticated location. Defaults to active insights ordered by impact_score DESC.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by lifecycle status. Defaults to "active".

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Filter by the pipeline run cadence that produced the insight.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Return insights with valid_from on or after this date (Y-m-d).

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Return insights with valid_from on or before this date (Y-m-d).

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort field (always descending). Defaults to impact_score.

post.summary: Manually trigger insight pipeline for a location
post.description: Manually dispatches the full insight pipeline (detection → AI synthesis) for the authenticated location. Returns 202 Accepted immediately; processing is asynchronous via the insights queue.

get.description: Returns the full detail of a single insight including evidence data points, AI recommendations, and data gap notes. Scoped to the authenticated location.

get.summary: Get loc feature pack KPI (30d vs 90d).
get.description: Fetch KPI evidence pack for one loc. Metrics are computed in ClickHouse and returned as a normalized payload.

parameters.name: loc
parameters.description: Optional loc id override (if enabled). Default: header-based loc context.

post.description: Returns the full Membership model: identity, loyalty points, wallet balance, and account metadata.
Returns visit counts, last visit date, upcoming bookings, cancellations, and no-shows for a single member at the current location.
Returns lifetime spend, period-based spend (30/90/365d), average ticket, highest ticket, and customer value band for a single member.
Returns last service used, favorite service, full service history ranked by visit count, and category-level aggregations for a single member.
Returns SMS and email deliverability flags derived from contact info availability and account active status.
Returns the customer lifecycle stage (new / active / at_risk / inactive / churned) based on visit recency at this location.

Returns the complete customer_marketing_profile: identity (Membership model), behavior, revenue, service affinity, marketing eligibility, and lifecycle stage in a single call. Preferred endpoint for the Audience Engine.
Returns new vs total member counts and a monthly new-customer breakdown. A "new customer" is a member whose first appointment at this location falls within the requested window.
Returns total visits, unique customers, member vs non-member split, return rate, and average visits per customer for the period.
Returns total revenue, total orders, average ticket, monthly breakdown, and top services by revenue for the period. Revenue is sourced from connect.orders filtered by pay_status.
Returns lifecycle stage distribution (new / active / at_risk / inactive / churned) and stage rates for all members who have ever visited this location.
Returns top 20 services ranked by booking count with booking share and unique customer counts for the period.

post.description: Returns total bookings, cancellation count, no-show count, and loss rates for the period
Returns cancellation and no-show counts per hour of day to identify high-loss windows
Returns top-N services ranked by cancellation volume with per-service cancellation and no-show rates
Returns total minutes lost to cancellations/no-shows, gap rate, and daily gap trend
Returns overall, peak, and off-peak utilization percentages for the period
Returns booking count and booked minutes per hour for capacity analysis
Returns per-day booked minutes and utilization percentage trend
Returns booked minutes and time-share percentage per service

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date in Y-m-d format (e.g., "2025-02-04"). Defaults to today.

status.description: Filter by insight lifecycle status. Defaults to "active" when omitted.

period.description: Filter by the pipeline run cadence that produced the insight.

from.description: Return insights with valid_from on or after this date (Y-m-d).

to.description: Return insights with valid_from on or before this date (Y-m-d).

ai_model.description: Filter by content generation source. Useful for quality comparison.

sort_by.description: Field to sort results by (always descending). Defaults to impact_score.

per_page.description: Number of insights per page. Defaults to 20.

period.description: The analysis period tier to run: hourly, daily, weekly, or monthly.

service_tax_id.description: 🏷️ Default tax ID applied to services

product_tax_id.description: 🏷️ Default tax ID applied to products

amount_tax_id.description: 🏷️ Default tax ID applied to amounts

enable_cash_skip_tip.description: 💵 Skip the tip prompt when paying by cash

staffer_required.description: 👤 Require a specific staff selection at booking

hide_contact.description: 🙈 Hide contact info on public pages

tax_calculation_mode.description: 🧮 Order in which tax, discount and surcharge are applied

color_source.description: 🎨 Source used to colour appointments on the calendar

name.description: Get the validation rules that apply to the request.
Get the validation rules that apply to the request.

media.description: Get the validation rules that apply to the request.

membership_id.description: 🆔 The primary key of the membership to fetch metrics for

resource_id.description: Get the validation rules that apply to the request.

order_id.description: Get the validation rules that apply to the request.

interval.description: Get the validation rules that apply to the request.

top.description: Number of top items to return (default: 10)

work_hours_per_day.description: Operational hours per day used as capacity baseline (default: 8)

peak_start_hour.description: Start hour of the peak window (0–23, default: 10)

peak_end_hour.description: End hour of the peak window (0–23, default: 18)

period.description: The analysis period tier that was requested.

id.description:
💡 InsightResource — single AI-generated insight card (full detail + list shape).

── Field mapping note ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
PHP model               → JSON key          → TS type
evidence.business_theme → business_theme    → InsightItem.business_theme
evidence.root_cause     → root_cause        → InsightItem.root_cause
evidence (rest)         → evidence          → InsightItem.evidence
proposed_actions        → proposed_actions  → InsightItem.proposed_actions
data_gaps (string[])    → data_gaps         → InsightItem.data_gaps (string[])

summary.example: Your cancellation rate rose from 2.6% to 8.8% — 6 out of 68 appointments were cancelled.

hypothesis.example: Late cancellations [Signal #1] are driving the gap spike [Signal #2].

signals.description: Multi-signal map: metric_key → feature snapshot. Present only for group-synthesis insights.

text.example: Enable the cancellation window policy to reduce late drops.

why_now.example: Signal #1 shows a 239% surge in cancellations leaving unfilled slots.

preconditions.example: Location must have an active waitlist with >5 entries.

evaluation_plan.example: Compare slot fill rate 4 weeks before vs after.

location_id.description:
Class LocFeaturePackResponse 📦📍📊

🎯 Purpose:
- Describe KPI API payload shape for one loc
- Unified response wrapper: { ok, meta, kpi }

🧩 Notes:
- "kpi" equals ClickHouse FORMAT JSON data[0]
- "kpi" can be null when there is no data

BehaviorMetricsResponse.description: Visit and booking behavior KPIs for a single member at a location.

last_visit_at.description: 🕒 Datetime of the last completed visit (null if none)

last_booking_at.description: 🕒 Datetime of the last booking with any active status (null if none)

days_since_last_visit.description: 📆 Days elapsed since the last completed visit

days_since_last_booking.description: 📆 Days elapsed since the last active booking

visit_count_30d.description: 🔢 Completed visits in the last 30 days

visit_count_90d.description: 🔢 Completed visits in the last 90 days

visit_count_365d.description: 🔢 Completed visits in the last 365 days

visit_count_all.description: 🔢 All-time completed visits at this location

booking_count_30d.description: 📋 Active bookings in the last 30 days (booked/checked-in/serving/completed)

booking_count_90d.description: 📋 Active bookings in the last 90 days

has_upcoming_booking.description: ✅ Whether the member has at least one future booking

next_booking_at.description: 📅 Datetime of the next upcoming booking (null if none)

cancel_count_90d.description: ❌ Cancelled appointments in the last 90 days

no_show_count_90d.description: 🚷 No-show appointments in the last 90 days

RevenueMetricsResponse.description: Spend and revenue KPIs for a single member (values stored in cents).

lifetime_spend.description: 💳 All-time spend in cents (denormalized from memberships.total_cost)

spend_30d.description: 💵 Amount spent in the last 30 days (cents, from connect.orders)

spend_90d.description: 💵 Amount spent in the last 90 days (cents)

spend_365d.description: 💵 Amount spent in the last 365 days (cents)

highest_ticket.description: 🏆 Highest single order total in cents

last_paid_at.description: 🕒 Datetime of the most recent paid order

last_paid_amount.description: 💵 Amount of the most recent paid order (cents)

customer_value_band.description: 🏷️ Customer value tier based on lifetime spend (low / mid / high / vip)

ServiceHistoryItem.description: 📋 One service entry in the member's ranked service history.

visit_count.description: 🔢 Number of times this service was booked

last_used_at.description: 🕒 Last booking datetime for this service

ServiceAffinityResponse.description: Service preference profile for a single member at a location.

last_service_id.description: 🆔 ID of the most recently booked service

last_service_name.description: 💆 Name of the most recently booked service

last_service_category_id.description: 🗂️ Category ID of the most recently booked service

last_service_category.description: 🗂️ Category name of the most recently booked service

favorite_service_id.description: ⭐ ID of the most frequently booked service

favorite_service_name.description: ⭐ Name of the most frequently booked service

favorite_category_id.description: 🗂️ Category ID of the favorite service

favorite_category.description: 🗂️ Category name of the favorite service

service_history.description: 📋 All services ranked by visit count (descending)

category_counts.description: 📊 Map of category name → total visits across that category

MarketingEligibilityResponse.description: Marketing deliverability flags derived from member contact info and account status.

has_phone.description: 📱 Whether a non-empty phone number is on file

has_email.description: 📧 Whether a non-empty email address is on file

phone_number.description: 📱 Phone number (null when has_phone is false)

email.description: 📧 Email address (null when has_email is false)

account_active.description: ✅ Whether the membership account is active (status = 1)

LifecycleResponse.description: Customer lifecycle stage computed from visit recency at this location.

customer_lifecycle_stage.description: 🏷️ Lifecycle stage: new(<30d customer) / active(≤30d) / at_risk(31-60d) / inactive(61-120d) / churned(>120d) / unknown(no visits)

days_since_last_visit.description: 📆 Days since the last completed visit (null = no visits)

days_as_customer.description: 📆 Days since the first visit at this location

total_visits.description: 🔢 Total active appointments at this location (all time)

last_visit_at.description: 🕒 Datetime of the last visit (null if unknown stage)

first_visit_at.description: 🕒 Datetime of the first visit (null if unknown stage)

FullProfileResponse.description: Complete customer marketing profile: all metric layers combined in a single response.

customer_id.description: 🆔 Membership ID this profile belongs to

generated_at.description: 🕒 ISO 8601 timestamp when this profile was generated

ReportPeriod.description: 📅 Date range window used to scope the report.

MonthlyNewCustomerItem.description: 📅 New customer count for a single calendar month.

new_customers.description: 🆕 Count of first-time visitors in this month

CustomerGrowthReportResponse.description: New member acquisition summary for a location over a date range.

total_customers.description: 👥 All-time unique customers ever seen at this location

new_customers.description: 🆕 Members whose first visit at this location falls in the requested period

monthly_breakdown.description: 📅 Monthly new-customer counts within the period

VisitReportResponse.description: Visit volume, unique customer counts, and return-rate KPIs for a location over a date range.

total_visits.description: 🏃 Total active appointments in the period

unique_customers.description: 👥 Distinct members with at least one visit in the period

member_visits_unique.description: 🪪 Unique members (with membership_id) in the period

non_member_visits.description: 🚶 Visit count from walk-ins with no membership_id

returning_customers.description: 🔄 Period customers who had at least one prior visit before the period

MonthlyRevenueItem.description: 📅 Revenue and order count for a single calendar month.

revenue.description: 💵 Total revenue in cents for this month

orders.description: 🔢 Number of paid orders in this month

TopServiceByRevenueItem.description: 💆 One service entry ranked by revenue.

revenue.description: 💵 Total revenue for this service in cents

order_count.description: 🔢 Number of times this service was sold

revenue_share.description: 📊 This service's share of total_revenue (0–1, rounded to 4 decimals)

RevenueReportResponse.description: Revenue summary from connect.orders for a location and date range (values in cents).

total_revenue.description: 💰 Sum of all paid order_items.price in cents

total_orders.description: 🔢 Number of paid orders in the period

average_ticket.description: 🎟️ total_revenue / total_orders in cents (rounded to 2 decimals)

monthly_breakdown.description: 📅 Monthly revenue breakdown within the period

SegmentCounts.description: 🎯 Raw member count per lifecycle stage.

new.description: 🆕 Members who joined < 30 days ago or have only 1 visit

SegmentRates.description: 📊 Lifecycle stage rates (0–1, rounded to 4 decimals).

SegmentationReportResponse.description: Lifecycle stage distribution for all members at a location.

total_customers.description: 👥 Total distinct members ever seen at this location

PopularServiceItem.description: 💆 One service entry ranked by booking volume.

booking_count.description: 🔢 Distinct appointments using this service in the period

unique_customers.description: 👥 Distinct members who booked this service

ServicePopularityReportResponse.description: Top 20 services ranked by booking volume for a location and date range.

services.description: 🏆 Top 20 services ordered by booking_count descending

total_bookings.description: 🔢 Total active appointments in the period (used for share calculation)

ResortData.description:
ResortData schema

Represents a single sortable entity (e.g., modifier, service option, etc.)
containing the unique ID and the desired sort order value.

This schema is typically used in resorting endpoints that accept an array
of such objects to update orderings in bulk.

id.description: Unique ID of the item to be sorted

sort_order.description: New sort order value for this item
